title: Mirrored Column Integration

posts.author: Kaitlynw2113 (Kaitlyn Rose)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’d really like the ability to integrate mirrored columns with Twillio and Gmail!
Use case: I have a board of contacts of contractors and a board of jobs I need to assign the contractors to. I’d like to be able to type a contact name and have the source board auto populate the email and phone number in the mirrored column on the target board. Once added, I’d like to be able to automate emails from gmail integration to notify the contractor of the job details and send them text reminders through twillio but the mirror column does not allow use with any integrations. I’ve been researching this and see that this complaint goes almost three years back and no resolutions from Monday so far. Please prioritize this capability!

posts.author: Kaitlynw2113 (Kaitlyn Rose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Still hoping for this integration @CSG @CXS

For anyone with the same problem, a workaround is to use the Vlookup integration but it is an additional expense.
